briefdescription.para: dt of its clock. Needed for creating time co-ordinates,
format of data. Default to csv.
Column name of this table. Use it when writing data to a datafile.
If stream is set to true, then stream to datafile_. Default value of datafile_ is table path starting from pwd/_tables_ . On table, set streamToFile to true.

detaileddescription.para: @Synopsis Collect data in given vector. Its similar to toJSON function.

briefdescription.para: Take the vector from table and timestamp it. It must only be called when packing the data for writing.

inbodydescription.para: Create the default filepath for this table.

detaileddescription.para: Receives and records inputs. Handles plot and spiking data in batch mode.
